loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing capacity scores and headroom based on active power and apparent power; current score uses rated kVA as a proxy for rated current as no direct rated_current_a column is available in the basket for this derived calculation.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing average load % and current load kW; headroom kW is omitted because the asset's nameplate rated_kw is unknown.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (kW) and frequency (Hz) trends. Readiness score, bypass voltage, and transfer counts are not measured by this UPS asset and are omitted.
